# IK Multi TR Mini 360 Heavy Duty Sprayer 20 oz 

The **IK Multi TR MINI 360** sprayer is the ideal tool for any cleaning and disinfection work, optimal for spraying a wide variety of chemicals such as [all purpose cleaners](https://www.carpro-us.com/deep-cleanse/?_bc_fsnf=1&Tech=All+Purpose+Cleaner), disinfectants, neutral chemicals, lightly concentrated acids (maximum 5%), and low-alkaline solutions (up to pH 11). The IK Multi TR MINI 360 is a light and handy trigger sprayer that incorporates a base for greater stability, a color-coded content identification system and a translucent tank that allows to check the level of liquid inside. This sprayer is ideal for isolated work on small surfaces. Has the ability to spray in all positions including upside down spraying thanks to it's 360 system.

### Features: 

- Adjustable spray nozzle.

- 360 system that allows spraying in all positions. 

- Strong translucent tank with level indicator. 

- Content identifying system.

- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool free. 

- Optimal for [all purpose cleaners,](https://www.carpro-us.com/deep-cleanse/?_bc_fsnf=1&Tech=All+Purpose+Cleaner) disinfectants, neutral products, alcohols, alkalis and ketones. Partially resistant to acids ([Chemical Product Table](https://www.iksprayers.com/en/chemical-product-table)).

### Specifications: 

- Net weight:0.39 lb

- Gross weight:0.39 lb

- Total capacity: 20 oz (0.6 L)

### Cleaning and Maintenance of the Sprayer:

- After each use depressurize the sprayer and clean it. 

- If the nozzle becomes blocked, clean it with water and do not use metallic objects.

- If the filter of the handle is clogged, remove it and clean it with water.

- Store the sprayer under cover, avoiding freezing temperatures and extreme heat (between 5 and 30 C).

- To prolong the life of the seals, regularly apply grease to the moving parts of the sprayer.
